objections.description: Review recommends both LRU eviction AND TanStack Query gcTime/staleTime as alternatives without clarifying which approach is actually implemented. This creates ambiguity — the team cannot implement both patterns simultaneously without conflicts.
objections.suggested_fix: Specify which caching strategy is the canonical implementation. If TanStack Query is adopted, remove LRU eviction requirements. If custom LRU is used, remove TanStack Query references.

objections.description: Chunk warning suppression fix suggests path-pattern matching but provides no concrete Rollup onwarn implementation. The review claims CI assertion should confirm suppression is functional but provides no assertion logic.
objections.suggested_fix: Provide actual Rollup onwarn filter code snippet and CI assertion script that validates pdf-export chunk exists and warning is suppressed while other chunks still trigger warnings.

objections.description: Review identifies viewport locking and keyboard handling as blocking but provides no verification that these issues exist in current codebase. No evidence these are actual bugs vs. assumptions about implementation.
objections.suggested_fix: Include actual code excerpts showing missing visualViewport listener and missing body scroll lock before marking as blocking. Verify against current implementation.

objections.description: Review demands unit tests for sanitize utility but doesn't specify test framework, coverage threshold, or which test files should be created. This is unactionable without test infrastructure context.
objections.suggested_fix: Specify test framework (Jest/Vitest), minimum coverage percentage, and expected test file location. Reference existing test patterns in the codebase.

objections.description: Review references Round 1 blockers as still standing but conversation history is empty. Cannot verify whether previous round issues were addressed or if this review is duplicating resolved work.
objections.suggested_fix: Include Round 1 artifact or summary of what was previously approved/rejected. Document which Round 1 issues remain unresolved vs. newly discovered.

objections.description: Virtualization requirement with react-window is marked non-negotiable but no performance baseline exists proving 2000+ siblings actually occur in production. This may be premature optimization.
objections.suggested_fix: Provide production data showing actual sibling counts. If max observed is <500, downgrade to recommended. If 2000+ exists, include load test evidence.

suggestions.description: Add concrete Rollup onwarn implementation example showing path-pattern matching for pdf-export suppression while preserving warnings for other chunks.
Clarify caching strategy choice between custom LRU vs. TanStack Query. Document decision rationale and remove conflicting alternatives from requirements.
Include actual code snippets showing current implementation gaps for viewport locking and keyboard handling to substantiate blocking severity.
Include Round 1 review summary or artifact reference to establish continuity and avoid re-litigating resolved issues.
